version_description: This version is a little more accurate and included the orchestra intro.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: When You Say Nothing At All
Two Less Lonely People In The World

content:
[Intro]

| [ch]Bsus2[/ch] | [ch]Bsus2[/ch] | [ch]Bsus4[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] |

| [ch]D/E[/ch] (13) | [ch]C#7/E[/ch] (#9) | [ch]C/E[/ch] (#11) | [ch]E5[/ch] |

| [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]F#m7/C#[/ch] | [ch]F#m7/C#[/ch] |

| [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]E/B[/ch] | [ch]F#m7/C#[/ch] | [ch]F#m7/C#[/ch] |



[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Esus4[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]C#dim7[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Gdim7[/ch]  [ch]E/G#[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]B/A[/ch]        [ch]G#m[/ch]     [ch]C#m[/ch]
And I don't know whether To laugh or cry[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]D#m7b5[/ch]   [ch]G#7+[/ch] [ch]G#7[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]
I don't know whether to live or die[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E/G#[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]
And it cuts like a knife[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A/B[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F#m7/C#[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch] [ch]C#dim7[/ch]
It's out of my hands[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]Gdim7[/ch]     [ch]E/G#[/ch]
It's out of my hands[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]B/A[/ch]       [ch]G#m[/ch]     [ch]C#m[/ch]
To think for two years she was here[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                [ch]D#m7b5[/ch]     [ch]G#7+[/ch] [ch]G#7[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]C#m/B[/ch]
And I took her for granted I was so cavalier[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E/G#[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]
Now the way that it stands[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A/B[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
She's out of my hands[/tab]

[Bridge]

[tab][ch]G/D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A/C#[/ch]           [ch]E/B[/ch]
So I've learned that love's not possession[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/D[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m[/ch]
And I've learned that love won't wait[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D/F#[/ch]         [ch]G#[/ch]   [ch]G#7[/ch]    [ch]C#m[/ch]
Now I've learned that love needs expression[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
But I learned too late[/tab]
[tab] [ch]B[/ch]        [ch]Esus4[/ch]
And she’s[/tab]



[Verse 3]

[tab] [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]C#dim7[/ch]
Out of my life[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]Gdim7[/ch]  [ch]E/G#[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]          [ch]B/A[/ch]   [ch]G#m[/ch]         [ch]C#m[/ch]
Damned indecision and cursed pride[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]G#m/D#[/ch]   [ch]D#m7b5[/ch]  [ch]G#7(b9)[/ch] [ch]G#7[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]C#m/B[/ch]
Kept my love for her locked deep inside[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E/G#[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]
And it cuts like a knife[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A/B[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F#m7/C#[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]
